title: Diary of a Bad Girl
writer: Léonide Moguy, Raymond Caillava, Michel Safra
actors: Anne Vernon, Danik Patisson, François Guérin
plot: Born into a well-off family, Hélène has become a devoted and passionate social worker. Touched by the lot of Christine, a young girl in distress, she persuades her father to take her at his home. But things soon go wrong and Chris...
